# services.mollysocket

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.mollysocket`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.mollysocket.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable [MollySocket](https://github.com/mollyim/mollysocket) for getting Signal notifications via UnifiedPush . |
| `services.mollysocket.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | Environment file (see {manpage}`systemd.exec(5)` "EnvironmentFile=" section for the syntax) passed to the service. This option can be used to safely include secrets in the configuration. |
| `services.mollysocket.logLevel` | `string` | Set the {env}`RUST_LOG` environment variable |
| `services.mollysocket.settings` | `open submodule of (TOML value)` | Configuration for MollySocket. Available options are listed [here](https://github.com/mollyim/mollysocket#configuration). |
| `services.mollysocket.settings.allowed_endpoints` | `list of string` | List of UnifiedPush servers |
| `services.mollysocket.settings.allowed_uuids` | `list of string` | UUIDs of Signal accounts that may use this server |
| `services.mollysocket.settings.host` | `string` | Listening address of the web server |
| `services.mollysocket.settings.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Listening port of the web server |
